steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between sea palm and bull kelp — specifically that bull kelp has a more intense umami flavor than sea palm. The correct choice must contrast the two.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: Does not contrast the two seaweeds — fails to show bull kelp's umami is more intense. ✗
  • Choice B: Describes a similarity rather than a difference in umami intensity. ✗
  • Choice C: Focuses on a factor other than umami intensity. ✗
  • Choice D: Directly contrasts sea palm's moderate umami with bull kelp's higher umami intensity. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
